section_title: Delegation of Power.- (1) The Government may delegate to the Director
content:
19. Delegation of Power.- (1) The Government may delegate to the Director
General or any other officer any of its powers under this Act or rules.
(2) The Director General may 1delegate to any other officer of the
Department any of his powers under this Act or rules.

sub_sections.text:
The Government may delegate to the Director
General or any other officer any of its powers under this Act or rules.

The Director General may 1delegate to any other officer of the
Department any of his powers under this Act or rules.
